prompts: Cinematic shot in a Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, warm wood interior with soft orange forge glow. Ari Ashbell, a masculine frontline adventurer in a reinforced leather guild cloak, is firmly holding a damaged shield flat on a workbench. Ari Emberlane, a feminine scout in a cropped travel jacket and messenger straps, carefully guides a small, non-sparking repair tool over the shield's surface. Cooperative teamwork, focused expressions, high-quality anime-inspired fantasy art style, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous cinematic shot of the guild forge. Ari Emberlane completes the repair by tapping a final harmless mark on the shield with her tool, while Ari Ashbell continues to hold the shield steady with a confident, reliable stance. Warm ambient lighting, clear fluid tool motion, friendly interaction, consistent character appearance, no text, no watermark.
